# children

**Instance Property**

Objects that position and orient in the scene relative to the given object.

## Declaration

```swift
var children: [PHASEObject] { get }
```

## Discussion

To manage members of this array, use [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/addChild(_:)],  [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/removeChild(_:)], and [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/removeChildren()].

## Managing the Hierarchy

- **parent**: The object that this instance positions and orients relative to in the scene.
- **addChild(_:)**: Adds the given object as a child.
- **removeChild(_:)**: Removes the given object as a child.
- **removeChildren()**: Removes all child objects from the given object.
